principles: production, scale, functionality and ecosystem value over raw quantity
no raw secrets stored in repository or chat
secret names and setup links only
apps may belong to multiple Swirms
Swirms can collaborate as inter-Swirm teams for projects and commands
free, open-source and low-hassle paths are prioritized before paid enterprise routes
high-risk actions require human SEAL approval before external execution

classification_model.swirm: overlapping functional class used for routing tools, agents, automations and integrations
classification_model.inter_swirm_team: temporary collaboration between Swirms to complete a command, product build, workflow, launch, proof, support case, or deployment

seal_levels.SEAL_0: public/read-only, no credential or user-impacting action
seal_levels.SEAL_2: authenticated internal action with low external risk
seal_levels.SEAL_3: production action affecting data, users, customers, or money-adjacent workflows
seal_levels.SEAL_4: external communication, publishing, payments, token issuance, identity/proof, or irreversible changes
seal_levels.SEAL_5: regulated, financial custody, sensitive identity, legal, medical, security-critical, or human safety impact; explicit human approval required

core_swirms.label: Intelligence
core_swirms.function: LLM reasoning, multimodal analysis, planning, coding, classification, routing and synthesis

core_swirms.label: Agentic Runtime
core_swirms.function: agents, swarms, planners, command routers, tool execution and project teams

core_swirms.label: MCP / Tool Context
core_swirms.function: standardized model-to-tool access through MCP gateways and allowlisted servers

core_swirms.label: Memory / Continuum
core_swirms.function: long-term memory, context recall, user and agent continuity, vector stores, graph memory

core_swirms.label: Data / Schema / Storage
core_swirms.function: transactional database, warehouse, schemas, APIs, events, storage and analytics source of truth

core_swirms.label: Automation / Workflow
core_swirms.function: event routing, scheduled jobs, webhooks, background workers, low-code orchestration

core_swirms.label: Identity / Web9
core_swirms.function: authentication, authorization, DID, verifiable credentials, wallet and naming routes

core_swirms.label: Proof / Ledger / Audit
core_swirms.function: event evidence, attestations, audit trails, carbon proof, certificates and provenance

core_swirms.label: Blockchain / Web3 / Tokenization
core_swirms.function: chains, wallets, token minting, smart contracts, fractionalization and settlement routes

core_swirms.label: Communication / Support / Call Center
core_swirms.function: email, SMS, chat, WhatsApp support, voice, video, call-center workflows and notifications

core_swirms.label: Developer / GitHub / CI-CD
core_swirms.function: repos, code generation, issue tracking, deployment, testing, SDKs and release pipelines

core_swirms.label: Cloud / Runtime / Hosting
core_swirms.function: frontend, backend, serverless, containers, queues, workers, storage and edge deployment

core_swirms.label: Security / Governance / Secrets
core_swirms.function: secrets, policies, scanning, observability, audit, RBAC, incident response and safety gates

core_swirms.label: CRM / Ops / Sales
core_swirms.function: leads, partners, customers, deals, support queues, product requests and execution boards

core_swirms.label: No-Code / Low-Code / White Label
core_swirms.function: rapid apps, portals, dashboards, admin tools, internal products and white-label packaging

core_swirms.label: Analytics / BI / Observability
core_swirms.function: metrics, dashboards, logs, traces, product analytics, event intelligence and financial reporting

core_swirms.label: Hardware / IoT / Edge
core_swirms.function: sensors, devices, QR/NFC, edge nodes, robotics, environmental monitors and real-world data capture

production_opportunities.name: OpenAI Platform
production_opportunities.access_method: API key, SDK, Apps SDK, server-side gateway
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: May require paid billing depending on model and usage; keep model routing and spend caps.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Keep as core intelligence route; add usage logging, model fallback, eval harness and no direct external action without policy gate.

production_opportunities.name: Anthropic Claude API
production_opportunities.access_method: API key through server-side gateway
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Typically paid API usage; use only as routed fallback or specialist reasoning path.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Add as second model provider behind router with prompt-injection filters and cost caps.

production_opportunities.name: Google Gemini / AI Studio
production_opportunities.access_method: API key or Google Cloud service account
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: AI Studio often offers easy developer setup; production Vertex usage may bill.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for multimodal and Google-side intelligence; route through provider abstraction.

production_opportunities.name: OpenRouter
production_opportunities.access_method: OpenAI-compatible API key
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Some models may be free or low-cost; production needs spend controls and model allowlist.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Activate as model fallback and experimentation lane, not sole source of truth.

production_opportunities.name: ABBA MCP Gateway
production_opportunities.access_method: Self-hosted gateway; MCP clients connect only to audited servers
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open standard and open-source implementations available; security review costs time.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Create allowlisted MCP gateway with read-only default, container isolation, no shell by default, per-tool policy, audit logging and kill switch.

production_opportunities.name: GitHub API / Actions / Apps
production_opportunities.access_method: GitHub App, fine-grained PAT, Actions secrets, webhooks
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free for public repos and limited private usage; Actions minutes may bill.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use GitHub App with least privilege; separate read, issue, PR and deploy permissions.

production_opportunities.name: Vercel
production_opportunities.access_method: Vercel token, GitHub deployment integration, CLI
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free/hobby path useful for early deployment; production may need paid plan.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Keep production site; add deployment health checks, preview gate and env registry.

production_opportunities.name: Cloudflare Developer Platform
production_opportunities.access_method: API token, Wrangler CLI, Git integration
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Strong free-tier path for edge apps, queues and security; watch usage limits.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Add as edge/security layer for public routes, Turnstile, queues and optionally MCP sandbox hosting.

production_opportunities.name: Supabase
production_opportunities.access_method: Project URL, anon key, service role key, SQL migrations
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free project tier available; production needs backups, RLS and paid scaling plan.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use as primary Postgres + auth/storage; enforce RLS, migrations and service-role isolation.

production_opportunities.name: PostgreSQL + pgvector
production_opportunities.access_method: Database connection string, SQL migrations, server-side pooler
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open source; free when self-hosted or via Supabase/Neon free tiers with limits.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Make canonical schema base for memory, proof and event logs; add migration checks.

production_opportunities.name: Qdrant
production_opportunities.access_method: REST/gRPC API key or self-hosted service
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Self-hosted open-source path; managed cloud may have free trial/tier.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for high-performance external vector memory if pgvector is insufficient.

production_opportunities.name: Memorae / Memoriae.ai
production_opportunities.access_method: API key once provider/account details are confirmed
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Provider-specific; verify pricing and API terms before production.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Keep registry-ready; activate after API docs, data policy and export/delete controls are confirmed.

production_opportunities.name: n8n
production_opportunities.access_method: n8n instance URL, API key, webhooks, credentials vault
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Self-hosted path is low-cost; n8n Cloud is paid but low-hassle.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use as automation conductor with credential separation, approval steps and event logs.

production_opportunities.name: Activepieces
production_opportunities.access_method: Self-hosted or cloud account; API keys per connector
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source self-host option; useful fallback to n8n.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Sandbox as secondary workflow engine; use if n8n coverage gaps appear.

production_opportunities.name: Temporal
production_opportunities.access_method: SDK, worker service, namespace credentials
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source self-host; managed Temporal Cloud paid.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Add when workflows outgrow n8n and require durable backend execution.

production_opportunities.name: Resend
production_opportunities.access_method: API key, verified domain, webhooks
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free tier commonly available with sending limits; verify domain before production.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for transactional system emails only after SPF/DKIM/DMARC setup and human-approved templates.

production_opportunities.name: Gmail / Google Workspace APIs
production_opportunities.access_method: OAuth consent, service account where appropriate, delegated scopes
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: APIs available with Google account; Workspace costs depend on account plan.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use draft-first mode for emails; external sends require human seal.

production_opportunities.name: Meta WhatsApp Business Platform
production_opportunities.access_method: Meta app, WhatsApp Business account, phone number ID, access token, webhook secret
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Conversation pricing and policy limits apply; customer-support use is safer than general-purpose chatbot distribution.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Activate only for approved business support, notifications and human-reviewed flows; avoid positioning as a general AI chatbot on WhatsApp.

production_opportunities.name: Twilio
production_opportunities.access_method: Account SID, auth token, messaging service, webhooks
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Trial path exists but production communications are paid and compliance-bound.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use only after consent, opt-out, call/SMS policy, logging and human approval rules are installed.

production_opportunities.name: LiveKit
production_opportunities.access_method: API key/secret, server SDK, client SDK
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source self-host path; managed cloud may have free credits/limits.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Sandbox for approved demos, voice assistant rooms and support handoff; record consent controls.

production_opportunities.name: Keycloak
production_opportunities.access_method: OIDC/OAuth clients, admin API, realm configuration
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free open-source; operational cost if self-hosted.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Adopt for enterprise identity layer when Supabase Auth is not enough; require backup and admin hardening.

production_opportunities.name: Authentik
production_opportunities.access_method: OIDC/SAML clients, proxy provider, admin token
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source self-host path; enterprise support optional.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Sandbox as easier self-hosted SSO alternative to Keycloak.

production_opportunities.name: W3C DID / Verifiable Credentials
production_opportunities.access_method: DID method resolver, VC issuer/verifier SDK, wallet integration
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Standards are free; implementation and key custody carry operational cost.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Start with did:web and test credentials; never issue production identity proofs without governance and revocation model.

production_opportunities.name: ENS / HNS / Web3 Naming Routes
production_opportunities.access_method: Wallet, registrar UI/API, chain transaction
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Generally requires registration fees and network fees; not free for production names.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Register only official brand-critical names after human approval; record ownership proofs.

production_opportunities.name: Ethereum / Base / Polygon
production_opportunities.access_method: RPC provider, wallet, smart contract SDK, indexer
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Testnets are free-ish except faucets; mainnet/l2 fees apply.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Start with testnet proof anchoring only; no minting, payments or token claims without legal and human SEAL review.

production_opportunities.name: thirdweb
production_opportunities.access_method: API key, dashboard, SDK, wallet signer
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Developer setup may be free; chain fees and higher usage may cost.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use only for sandbox token/proof prototypes before custom audited contracts.

production_opportunities.name: Hyperledger FireFly / Fabric
production_opportunities.access_method: Self-hosted nodes, REST APIs, chaincode, consortium governance
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source but operationally heavier; use when enterprise proof needs private ledger.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Registry-ready for enterprise carbon proof pilots; do not activate until governance model is defined.

production_opportunities.name: Stripe
production_opportunities.access_method: Secret key, publishable key, webhook signing secret, Connect if marketplace
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: No monthly setup for basic payments but transaction fees apply.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Sandbox first; production payments require human approval, tax/legal setup, refund policy and audit logging.

production_opportunities.name: Airtable
production_opportunities.access_method: Personal access token, base ID, webhooks
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free tier useful for MVP; scale may require paid plan.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for operating views and partner records while canonical data remains in Postgres.

production_opportunities.name: Baserow
production_opportunities.access_method: API token, self-host URL, table IDs
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Self-hosted open-source route; cloud plans optional.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use as open-source operating database mirror for Airtable-like workflows.

production_opportunities.name: NocoDB
production_opportunities.access_method: API token, database connection, self-host URL
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Self-hosted open-source path; cloud optional.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Sandbox as admin UI for Postgres-backed registries.

production_opportunities.name: Appsmith
production_opportunities.access_method: Self-host or cloud; datasource credentials stored in platform
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source self-host path; cloud plans optional.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Build internal ABBA owner console, registry browser and proof admin tools.

production_opportunities.name: Base44 / Lovable / Replit App Builders
production_opportunities.access_method: OAuth/account connection, GitHub export where supported, environment variables
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free or trial routes vary; production export/control must be verified per app.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use as testing grounds for concepts; production code should be exported, reviewed and deployed under Carbon Actual control.

production_opportunities.name: Odoo / ERPNext / Twenty CRM
production_opportunities.access_method: API key/OAuth, self-host credentials, webhooks where supported
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source/self-host paths exist; hosted enterprise plans may cost.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Choose one CRM/ERP spine after needs are clear; avoid running all three in production.

production_opportunities.name: Infisical / HashiCorp Vault / Doppler
production_opportunities.access_method: CLI, API token, service identities, environment sync
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Infisical has open-source path; Vault open-source is free but operationally heavier; Doppler has hosted plans.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Activate Infisical first for low-hassle secret vault; rotate all existing app secrets through it.

production_opportunities.name: Sentry / OpenObserve / Wazuh
production_opportunities.access_method: SDK DSN, log forwarder, agent, API token
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Sentry has developer tiers; OpenObserve/Wazuh self-host options reduce vendor cost.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Add Sentry immediately for app errors; evaluate OpenObserve/Wazuh for logs and security operations.

production_opportunities.name: Plausible / PostHog / Metabase
production_opportunities.access_method: JS snippet, API key, database connection, event SDK
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Self-host/open-source options exist; hosted plans may charge by events/users.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use Plausible for simple web analytics, PostHog for product events, Metabase for owner BI.

production_opportunities.name: MQTT / Node-RED / Home Assistant
production_opportunities.access_method: MQTT broker credentials, Node-RED flows, device integrations
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source self-host path; hardware sensors cost separately.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for carbon/environmental sensor pilots; tag readings with calibration metadata before proof claims.

recommended_inter_swirm_teams.mission: Deploy and operate the ABBA MAS production spine
recommended_inter_swirm_teams.output: secure app runtime, event logs, deployment pipeline, health checks, model router

recommended_inter_swirm_teams.mission: Build ABBA long-term memory and context recall
recommended_inter_swirm_teams.output: recall API, memory policy, vector index, source-linked memories, delete/export controls

recommended_inter_swirm_teams.mission: Create identity, proof, certificates and carbon evidence routes
recommended_inter_swirm_teams.output: DID test route, VC sandbox, proof event schema, ledger anchoring testnet, human SEAL workflow

recommended_inter_swirm_teams.mission: Build approved customer communication and support workflows
recommended_inter_swirm_teams.output: draft-first support, approved notifications, CRM records, consent logs, no unsupervised external sends

recommended_inter_swirm_teams.mission: Generate MVP apps, landing pages, demos and internal dashboards
recommended_inter_swirm_teams.output: MVP prototypes, owner console, registry browser, launch pages, analytics dashboards

minimum_production_schema.swirm_membership_rule: A single integration can belong to many Swirms. Routing should select by command intent, data sensitivity, action risk, availability, cost and SEAL permission.
